reasoning: The control SC-12 focuses on cryptographic key establishment and management, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to the management of secrets and etcd encryption. Kubernetes supports encryption of secrets at rest and etcd encryption, which aligns with the requirement for cryptographic key management. Additionally, while Kubernetes does not natively support key rotation policies, it is possible to define and enforce such policies through external integrations or custom implementations.
title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
